mentions.note: Bolt data center play interesting but stock still trades on oil/gas fundamentals; spec-only if betting oil higher.
Best S&P performer in February, up 50.5%, on oil spike and data center optionality; energy tailwind may reverse if peace breaks out with Iran.
Permian land owner up 65% Q1 (9th best); leases surface/sells fracking water; down 14% this week anticipating war end and oil decline—prelude to pullback if strait reopens.
